steps.title: Rewrite the given equation
steps.content:
Divide the first equation by $3$:
$$
3x+9y=24
$$
$$
x+3y=8
$$

steps.title: Use the no solution condition
steps.content: A linear system has no solution when the lines are parallel and distinct. That means the other equation can have the same left side, but it must have a different constant.

steps.title: Select the parallel equation
steps.content: The equation $x+3y=-14$ has the same left side as $x+3y=8$ but a different constant, so the lines do not intersect. The answer is B.
